title: oxalis corniculata var. lyonii
intro: Oxalis corniculata var. lyonii, also known as Yellow Wood Sorrel, is a plant species belonging to the Oxalidaceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and distinctive leaves with sharp points. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly due to its high concentration of oxalic acid, which has been used to treat various health conditions. Oxalis corniculata var. lyonii has been used to alleviate symptoms of rheumatism, arthritis, and skin conditions, as well as to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or used in tincture form to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity.
